description_long: This is a small, single-serving cake with a fluted, dark-colored base resembling a cupcake liner, topped with a generous swirl of pale pink icing. At the peak of the icing sits a glossy red cherry, complete with a brown stem that leans at an angle. The icing is smoothly layered in concentric, slightly faceted rings, giving it a stylized, geometric appearance. The base appears solid and sturdy, contrasting with the soft, creamy look of the icing. The overall design is minimalist, with the cherry serving as the only decorative element. This cake would be visually appealing in a bakery display or as a treat in an urban park setting.
description: A small, fluted cupcake with pale pink icing, topped by a red cherry and brown stem. The design is minimalist and geometric, with a dark base and smooth, swirled icing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cherry and stem centered atop the pink icing, with the fluted dark base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the cherry and stem angled to the right, revealing more of the icing's swirl and the base's faceted edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the cherry and stem pointing away, highlighting the symmetry of the icing and the uniformity of the base.
description_view_3: Side view with the cherry stem angled left, showing the layered icing and the full height of the cupcake's base.
